overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a slow nighttime journey along a river toward a distant mountain village. The camera moves through a moody, atmospheric landscape with stormy skies, passing from a lantern-lit stone wall section through an open valley to approach warm-lit wooden buildings.

events.description: ducks swim into view in the river water

agents.ego_description: moving slowly along the river bank toward distant village lights

notable_agents.action: ducks swimming in the river current

low stone wall running along the left bank of the river
large mountain peak visible in the distance against the night sky
warm glowing lights from distant buildings across the valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside a river at night, with a warm wooden lantern post illuminating the left bank and a stone wall running alongside. Ducks swim in the water as the camera moves forward, with a snow-capped mountain and distant village lights visible ahead through the cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with mountain backdrop

events.description: exits the walled riverside section into the open valley
moving away from lantern light into darker moonlit open area

agents.ego_description: traveling through the open river valley toward the distant village

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face replacing the stone wall along the left bank
autumn trees with sparse foliage along the right riverbank

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide river valley flanked by a stone cliff on the left and scattered autumn trees on the right. Moving away from the warm lantern light, the environment becomes darker and more exposed under the cloudy night sky, with the village lights growing slightly larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: village approach with wooden watermill and bridge

events.description: approaching the village perimeter with wooden structures becoming visible
warm artificial lights from village buildings becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: approaching the village entrance and wooden water structures along the river

entered.detail: large wooden structure with water wheel on the riverbank
wooden footbridge crossing the river ahead
tall evergreen tree on the right bank near the village

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the village entrance where a wooden watermill building and bridge become prominent features. The environment transitions from natural valley to built settlement, with warm light spilling from wooden houses and illuminating the river as the camera moves toward the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, lantern-lit riverbank into the warm glow of a distant mountain village. It begins beside a stone wall where a wooden lantern post casts a warm light over swimming ducks, with snow-capped peaks and flickering village lights visible under a cloudy night sky. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a wide river valley, leaving the lantern light behind to pass between a towering stone cliff and scattered autumn trees. The environment then shifts from the dark, exposed valley toward the settlement's edge, where a wooden watermill and bridge emerge from the shadows. Finally, the camera approaches the village entrance as warm light spills from wooden houses, illuminating the river at the crossing.
